title: Instance Validation CI — mechanical enforcement of instance-schema conformance
description: Adds .github/workflows/instance-validation.yml — CI workflow validating all instances under schemas/_instances/** against their declared schemas (rule.schema.json for rules; deliverable.schema.json for deliverables) on every PR. Drift fails the check; contributor must regenerate or fix instances before merge. Closes FU-RULE-INSTANCE-VALIDATION-CI-1 and FU-DELIVERABLE-SCHEMA-INSTANCE-VALIDATION-CI-1.

outputs.description: Substrate validation report — verifies all 12 existing instances (5 rules + 7 deliverables) validate against their schemas at deliverable initiation. Gate: failure means workflow does not land until instances are fixed.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 rule instances validate against rule.schema.json
All 7 deliverable instances validate against deliverable.schema.json
Zero pre-existing failures before workflow lands

outputs.description: .github/workflows/instance-validation.yml — GHA workflow validating instances on every PR.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers on PRs touching schemas/_instances/**, schemas/rule.schema.json, schemas/deliverable.schema.json, or the workflow file
Validates rule instances against rule.schema.json via ajv-cli@5 --strict=false
Validates deliverable instances against deliverable.schema.json via ajv-cli@5 --strict=false
Fails on any instance validation failure (non-zero exit)
Workflow passes on this PR (since substrate is clean per OUT-1)

outputs.description: schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-01-rule-instance-validation-ci.json — prospective deliverable spec; S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7 → S8 in post-merge amendment.
acceptanceCriteria: Instance file exists at canonical path

preMerge: All 12 existing instances validate locally against their schemas (Step 2 gate passed: 0 of 12 failed)
Deliverable spec instance validates against deliverable.schema.json
postMerge: instance-validation workflow runs on subsequent PRs

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after foundation arc closed (D-3 merge 07e43bd); first FU-block deliverable; structural prerequisite for FU-D-2 onward
PROCEED STEP 2 issued; substrate validation executed clean (12/12 instances pass)
Workflow authored, YAML validated, self-test clean (13/13 instances pass including FU-D-1 spec); preparing PR
Squash merge to main via MERGE PR 63
Post-merge: workflow on main, validate-instances passed on first run, refs rebuild --check exit 0

notes: First deliverable in the post-foundation FU block. Substrate-validation-first gate (Step 2) ensures workflow lands against clean state — 12/12 instances passed before workflow authoring proceeded. Foundation-strengthening: mechanical enforcement on every PR replaces ad-hoc ajv-cli calls inside dispatch files. Prerequisite for FU-D-2 (UNSTABLE merge blocker) and subsequent rule promotions.
